comments: Abundant orange coloured iron oxidizing bacteria and foamy water.
Less abundant orange coloured iron oxidizing bacteria and foamy water.
Study site had ready pedestrian access and seems to have suffered from some trampling. Immediately North of Guildford hwy. Fish bones were present.
Near Noons Creek Hatchery and recreation centre; snow from the recreation centre was present near our study site.
Snowed day of surveying; road salt may have been used to de-ice roads, increasing conductivity levels. Fish bones were present. Near bridge. Very steep slope
Stream was in a relatively remote mountainside suburb. Slope and elevation is much higher compared to the other streams.
